issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Build a React store locator with 200+ clustered markers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses MapContainer/TileLayer/Marker/Popup with OpenStreetMap tiles, react-leaflet-cluster, CSS import, and SSR guidance per the skill; baseline reaches for Google Maps which fails the Leaflet-specific rubric.

scenarios.name: Render GeoJSON delivery zones with styled polygons and popups
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the GeoJSON component with style callback driven by feature.properties and onEachFeature+bindPopup exactly as in the skill; baseline manually maps Polygons and misses the GeoJSON pattern.
